name_en: P Kate Crocodile Edition, new arrival, size is just right, perfect for summer, suitable for any body type. Embossed crocodile effect on calfskin, scales are slightly raised, very fragile, please handle with care. Limited release in designated areas, definitely won't clash with others. Size 20x14x5cm, Code 377629
